# Narrative Protocol - LLMs Full Reference

## 1) Overview
Narrative Protocol is a World State & Event Engine for defining worlds, versioning event behavior, executing events (AI or direct), and recording verifiable execution history.

Base URL:
`https://api.narrativeprotocol.com`

Health:
`GET /health`

## 2) Auth

### API routes
All `/api/*` routes require:
`Authorization: Bearer <api-key>`

Notes:
- Debug auth and debug registration flow are removed.
- Invalid/missing token returns `401`.

### Public app route
`/app/*` does not require API key, but uses wallet signature checks.

## 3) Route Model

The API now uses world-scoped nested routes for entity schemas, events, deployments, bindings, and instances.
Direct legacy routes such as `/api/entity-schemas`, `/api/events`, `/api/deployments`, `/api/entity-instances`, and `/api/event-bindings` are removed.

## 4) Worlds

- `GET /api/worlds`
- `POST /api/worlds`
- `GET /api/worlds/:id`
- `PUT /api/worlds/:id`
- `DELETE /api/worlds/:id`
- `POST /api/worlds/:id/publish`
- `POST /api/worlds/:id/unpublish`

Create world body:
```json
{
  "name": "Horse Racing",
  "description": "A horse racing simulation world",
  "domainTags": ["sports", "simulation"],
  "promptSeed": "This world simulates realistic horse racing events."
}
```

## 5) Entity Schemas & Attributes

### Entity Schemas (world-scoped)
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldId/entity-schemas`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/entity-schemas`

Create schema body:
```json
{
  "name": "horse",
  "description": "A racing horse",
  "attributeDefinitions": [
    {
      "name": "speed_rating",
      "type": "float",
      "constraints": { "min": 0, "max": 1 },
      "defaultValue": 0.5
    }
  ]
}
```

### Attributes (schema-scoped)
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldId/entity-schemas/:schemaId/attributes`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/entity-schemas/:schemaId/attributes`
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldId/entity-schemas/:schemaId/attributes/:name`
- `PUT /api/worlds/:worldId/entity-schemas/:schemaId/attributes/:name`
- `DELETE /api/worlds/:worldId/entity-schemas/:schemaId/attributes/:name`

Notes:
- Attribute identity is by `name` within an entity schema.
- Unique constraint exists on `(entitySchemaId, name)`.

## 6) Events & Event Versions

### Events (world-scoped)
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldId/events`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/events`

### Event versions (event-scoped)
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldId/events/:eventId/event-versions`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/events/:eventId/event-versions`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/events/:eventId/event-versions/:version/publish`

### Event version fields (current)
```json
{
  "inputSchema": {},
  "outputSchema": {},
  "readEntities": [{ "schemaId": 1, "filter": ["eq:name:HORSE_1"] }],
  "entityChangeSettings": { "horse": "partial" },
  "behaviorPrompt": "...",
  "mutationSettings": {
    "mode": "ai",
    "template": {}
  },
  "executionSettings": {
    "visibility": "admin",
    "priceUsd": 0,
    "cron": {
      "schedule": "*/5 * * * *",
      "input": {}
    }
  }
}
```

Field migration summary:
- `reads` -> `readEntities`
- `stateChangeSchema` -> `entityChangeSettings`
- `resultSchema` -> `outputSchema`

Validation notes:
- `mutationSettings.mode = "direct"` requires `mutationSettings.template`.
- Cron schedules in `executionSettings.cron.schedule` must be valid cron expressions.

## 7) Deployments

### Deployments (world-scoped)
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments/:deploymentId/lock`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments/:deploymentId/execute`
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments/:deploymentId/history?page=1&limit=10`

Create deployment body:
```json
{
  "name": "Season 1",
  "description": "Runtime deployment",
  "mode": "upgradable",
  "targetChains": ["near-testnet"],
  "aiModelId": "openai/gpt-oss-120b",
  "onchain": {
    "stateChanges": ["wins"],
    "result": ["winner"]
  },
  "isLLMPublic": false,
  "payToAddress": "6Q2...wallet",
  "firstBinding": {
    "eventId": 1,
    "eventVersion": 1
  },
  "sourceDeploymentId": 123
}
```

### New deployment fields
- `payToAddress` for paid public execution settlement.

## 8) Event Bindings

- `GET /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments/:deploymentId/event-bindings`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments/:deploymentId/event-bindings`

Binding body:
```json
{
  "eventId": 1,
  "eventVersion": 2
}
```

Notes:
- Bound event must belong to same world.
- Only published event versions can be bound.

## 9) Entity Instances

- `GET /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments/:deploymentId/entity-instances`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments/:deploymentId/entity-instances`

List supports optional query filter:
- `entitySchemaId`

Create instance body:
```json
{
  "entitySchemaId": 1,
  "instanceId": "HORSE_1",
  "state": {
    "name": "Midnight Comet",
    "speed_rating": 0.85
  }
}
```

## 10) Event Execution

### Admin execution (API key)
`POST /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments/:deploymentId/execute`

Body:
```json
{
  "eventId": 1,
  "input": {
    "raceId": "RACE_001"
  }
}
```

Response includes:
- `historyId`
- `eventVersion`
- `stateChanges`
- `result`
- `attestation`
- `oracle` (`solana`, `near`)

### Public execution (wallet)
`POST /app/deployments/:address/execute`

Body:
```json
{
  "eventId": 1,
  "input": {},
  "wallet": "<solana-wallet>",
  "signature": "<base58-signature>",
  "message": "narrativeprotocol:<deploymentAddress>:<eventId>:<timestamp>"
}
```

Rules:
- Deployment must be public.
- Event version must have `executionSettings.visibility = "public"`.
- Message timestamp max skew: 5 minutes.
- Rate limit: 30 requests/minute per wallet.
- If priced (`priceUsd > 0`), include `X-Payment` (x402) or receive `402 Payment Required`.

## 11) Cron Execution

Event versions can run on cron when:
- `executionSettings.visibility = "cron"`
- Valid `executionSettings.cron.schedule` is set.

Cron executor runs periodically and resolves templated cron input before execution.

## 12) AI Models

- `GET /api/ai-models`

Use model ID in deployment `aiModelId`.

## 13) Errors

Common status codes:
- `400` validation errors
- `401` unauthorized
- `403` forbidden
- `404` not found
- `409` conflicts
- `402` payment required (public priced execution)

## 14) Quick End-to-End

1. `POST /api/worlds`
2. `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/entity-schemas`
3. `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/entity-schemas/:schemaId/attributes`
4. `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/events`
5. `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments`
6. `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments/:deploymentId/entity-instances`
7. `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments/:deploymentId/execute`
